$comment: Defines the three products built from this one source. The build walks the repo root, drops anything matching alwaysExclude (build artifacts + Finder ' 2' duplicates are handled in code), then drops each variant's own exclude globs. 'core' strips the UI layer; 'claude-design' ships everything; 'standalone' ships everything plus the API server in standalone-server/.

core.title: DS Core (headless)
core.audience: The agent inside Claude Design. Load as a design system; no interface.

claude-design.title: Claude Design + UI
claude-design.audience: Loads into Claude Design as a full design system, interface included. This is today's shipping product.

standalone.title: Standalone (Opus 4.8 API)
standalone.audience: Runs outside Claude Design with its own UI, driving claude-opus-4-8 via the Anthropic API.
